name: engineering-mastery-marketplace
description: Eighteen skills for professional software engineering, built from canonical literature.

plugins.name: engineering-mastery
plugins.description: Eighteen skills for professional software engineering: clean code, clean architecture, defensive programming, testing, performance, code review, security, observability, refactoring, API design, concurrency, documentation, AI-native codebase design, ML experimentation, A/B testing, mobile development, frontend development, and algorithms.
